tasks.description: Diagnosed cpm-report-agent v1.0.15 test failure root cause: Babel state machine checkpoint corruption from old session. Found correct test path via workspace orchestrator delegation.
Verified cpm-report-agent v1.0.15 runs to completion via workspace orchestrator. Full 7-section dashboard rendered, no errors, isTestRun branch confirmed working.
Fixed cowork-tracker.ts: moved 'use agent' inside run(), changed spread to Object.assign, removed guild_get_me / guild_get_daily_llm_usage calls that throw Not Authenticated.

Diagnosed universal-tracker v2.0.0 failures: INIT mode crashes on blocked fetch, dashboard mode returns empty due to fetch block + no API key for task.llm.generateText. Source in main repo is v1 using wrong @guild-sdk/agent package.

Full rewrite of universal-tracker.ts from @guild-sdk/agent (v1) to @guildai/agents-sdk (v3): new agent() export pattern, 'use agent' inside run(), Object.assign tools, try-catch on all fetch calls, static fallbacks when fetch fails, no task.llm.generateText() calls.
